data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Container epic: all work landed via its 5 children (9fd5 DSSE, 518b registry, 7e53 HMAC-legacy, 56d9 SSHSIG, f25e docs), each CLOSED with plan-review + completion-verifier signatures and each landed as a Gerrit change (531-535) with a rebar-ticket trailer and Verified +1 (LLM-Review +1 too). The epic itself authors no dedicated commit — its planning file_impact (src/rebar/attest/, signing.py) is delivered by the children's referencing commits. No epic-specific code to verify; children carry the signed proof.". Session: ea905fb6-f7ce-47ca-abc8-aca3567949fc.
